gold.rationale: 关于“司机失联超300天、警方称暂未发现他杀迹象并将再次搜索”的部分与原始素材相符，但文本把未经证实的“本周大规模打捞、发现疑似随身物品”包装为‘最新进展’，且配图通过时间戳与警戒线等元素强化为‘延安3月搜救现场’，造成语境前置与图文时间/事件归属不一致。

atomic_points.post_summary: 陕西延安 58 岁校车司机赵永刚在聚餐后失联超过 300 天，家属回忆其最后通话称“咦？怎么没路了？”，警方暂未发现他杀迹象并继续搜索，网传本周当地开展大规模打捞及救援画面。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 【延安当地校车司机聚餐后失联超 300 天】
atoms: Post title claims a school bus driver in Yan'an is missing after a gathering.
Post title states the driver has been missing for over 300 days.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 家属称，陕西延安 58 岁校车司机赵永刚在一次聚餐结束后失联，至今已超过 300 天。
atoms: Family claims the driver is from Yan'an, Shaanxi.
Family claims the driver is 58 years old.
Family claims the driver is a school bus driver.
Family claims the driver went missing after a gathering.
Family claims the driver has been missing for over 300 days.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 警方回应称，目前暂未发现他杀迹象，后续将再次组织搜索。
atoms: Police respond that there is no indication of homicide so far.
Police state they will organize another search later.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 家属回忆，赵永刚失联前与家人有过最后一次通话。
atoms: Family recalls the driver had a last call with family before going missing.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 家属转述，电话中他最后说了一句“咦？怎么没路了？”，随即通话中断，此后再无消息。
atoms: Family reports the driver said '咦？怎么没路了？' on the phone.
Family reports the call ended immediately after that statement.
Family reports there has been no further news since then.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 家属表示，赵永刚当晚从聚餐地点离开后去向不明，亲属多方寻找仍未找到。
atoms: Family states the driver left the gathering location that night.
Family states the driver's whereabouts are unknown after leaving.
Family states relatives searched in multiple places but did not find him.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 警方介绍，前期已进行走访和线索核查，暂未发现他杀迹象。
atoms: Police state they conducted visits and clue verification earlier.
Police state there is still no indication of homicide.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 下一步将结合地形情况及群众提供的线索继续搜寻，并呼吁知情者提供信息。
atoms: Police plan to continue searching using terrain information and public clues.
Police appeal to those with information to provide it.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 网络流传的“最新进展”称，本周延安当地一处水库及下游河道周边开展大规模打捞。
atoms: Online reports claim a large-scale salvage operation is underway.
Online reports state the operation is in Yan'an this week.
Online reports state the operation covers a reservoir and downstream river area.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 有目击者称在岸边发现疑似随身物品，包括疑似衣物碎片、手机壳等；
atoms: Witnesses claim items were found on the shore.
Witnesses claim suspected personal items include clothing fragments.
Witnesses claim suspected personal items include a phone case.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 另有救援人员透露，夜间曾对沿岸浅滩进行照明搜索，但相关物品来源仍有待进一步确认。
atoms: Rescuers revealed they conducted illuminated searches on shallow areas at night.
Rescuers state the source of the items remains to be confirmed.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 网传图片显示，一张疑似车内与路边场景的照片角落标注“××搜救 2026.03 延安”，画面中可见疑似警戒线及地面拖拽痕迹等元素，引发关注。
atoms: Online images show a photo with a scene inside a car and roadside.
The photo corner is marked '××搜救 2026.03 延安'.
The image shows suspected warning tape.
The image shows suspected dragging marks on the ground.
The image has caused public attention.

Image caption states it is the police investigation site.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 截至目前，家属表示仍希望尽快获得明确下落，继续请求扩大排查范围，并呼吁曾在延安相关路段、水库河道周边见过赵永刚或掌握其行踪线索的人员，尽快与警方或家属联系。
atoms: Family hopes to get a clear answer soon.
Family requests to expand the search scope.
Family appeals to people who saw the driver in Yan'an relevant roads or reservoir areas.

Family urges these people to contact police or family immediately.

retrieved_evidence.text: 据家属和有关单位介绍，失联人员为在延安从事学生接送工作的校车司机赵永刚。多名熟悉情况的家长称，他平日负责接送的线路相对固定，工作时间规律，失联前工作和生活未见异常。当地教育及交通等部门表示，已就其工作记录、行车路线等情况进行核查，并与家属保持沟通，后续将配合公安机关做好相关调查和善后工作。

#校车司机聚餐后失联已超300天#【延安一校车司机聚餐后失联超300天仍无踪迹 警方：目前未发现他杀迹象，将再次搜索】#校车司机失联300天未发现他杀迹象#“咦？怎么没路了？”这是赵鹏听到父亲赵永刚在这个世界上说的最后一句话，此后他的父亲生死不明，音讯全无，距今失联已超过300天。

#校车司机聚餐后失联已超300天#【延安一校车司机聚餐后失联超300天仍无踪迹 警方：目前未发现他杀迹象，将再次搜索】#校车司机失联300天未发现他杀迹象#“咦？怎么没路了？”这是赵鹏听到父亲赵永刚在这个世界上说的最后一句话，此后他的父亲生死不明，音讯全无，距今失联已超过300天。

赵永刚原本是 ​​​

#校车司机聚餐后失联已超300天#【延安一校车司机聚餐后失联超300天仍无踪迹 警方：目前未发现他杀迹象，将再次搜索】#校车司机失联300天未发现他杀迹象#“咦？怎么没路了？”这是赵鹏听到父亲赵永刚在这个世界上说的最后一句话，此后他的父亲生死不明，音讯全无，距今失联已超过300天。

赵永刚原本是 ​​​
对于校车司机赵永刚长期失联一事，当地警方近日回应称，目前在已掌握的线索范围内，尚未发现明显他杀迹象。警方表示，前期已组织多轮搜寻和调查，调取相关监控并走访多人，下一步将结合新的线索再次开展有针对性的搜索行动。警方同时呼吁，如有知情者愿意提供线索，可通过正式渠道联系公安机关，相关信息将依法予以保密。
延安一名从事校车驾驶工作的男子在与同事聚餐后失联已超过300天，据家属和相关人员介绍，其日常接送学生行驶的路线多为当地乡镇与县城之间的道路，沿途为坡陡弯多、车流相对分散的陕北黄土高原地带。家属持续通过张贴寻人启事、走访学校和村镇等方式寻找线索，并向警方反映其身高、体貌特征和工作经历，希望社会提供更多关于这起长时间失联事件的有效信息。
据家属近日向媒体反映，校车司机赵永刚的失联时间已超过300天，长时间杳无音讯令家人十分焦虑。家属表示，这期间多次向警方和相关部门咨询进展，并自行前往可能路线和地点寻找，但始终未能获得实质性线索。熟悉情况的法律人士指出，此类长期失联案件往往调查周期较长，相关程序需依照规定推进，家属目前仍在等待新进展。
据家属向记者转述，在赵永刚失联前，曾通过电话听到他讲出“咦？怎么没路了？”这样一句话，随后通讯中断。家属表示，当时对这句话并未多想，事后回忆才意识到可能与其所处位置或行车情况有关。参与搜寻的人员称，这一细节已向公安机关反映，相关部门在研判行车轨迹和路线时将这一点纳入参考，具体含义仍有待进一步核实。
记者近日从多方获悉，一名在延安当地工作的校车司机去年失联的情况持续引发关注。知情人士称，相关线索最初均指向延安周边区域，家属和社会各界的关注也主要集中在这一带。当地基层组织和救援力量曾多次在附近山沟、道路沿线及水域开展搜寻。有关人员表示，目前尚无明确证据表明其离开延安地区，相关部门后续工作仍在进行中。
网传“3月最新搜救/勘查现场”相关内容中，曾出现带有“2026.03”和“延安”字样的现场描述，细节元素包括车内座椅、地面污渍、局部警戒线等，被部分网友解读为刑侦勘查的重要进展。然而据警方在近期通报中介绍，目前尚未发现明确他杀迹象，关于车内血迹和最新搜救地点的具体情况仍以正式调查为准，执法部门也表示将再次组织对校车行驶路线及周边复杂道路环境的排查与搜索。
据家属回忆，赵永刚失联当天曾与几名熟人一起聚餐，离席后便与外界失去联系。家属称，聚餐结束时间在当晚较晚时段，之后他原本计划沿惯常路线返家，但自那以后再无确切行踪记录。多名参与搜寻的人士表示，聚餐地点及其回家途中一带已被多次排查，监控和过往记录也在核查范围内，相关细节仍有待进一步梳理。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the core facts (missing driver, duration, police stance, last call) but introduces a specific fabricated date in the image caption and frames unverified online rumors as confirmed police actions.
text_analysis.t2_evidence: Post claims '本周延安当地一处水库及下游河道周边开展大规模打捞' (large-scale salvage at reservoir this week) based on 'network rumors' (网传), whereas evidence [8] and [5] only confirm searches in 'nearby mountain gullies, road lines, and water areas' without specifying a large-scale reservoir operation or confirming it happened 'this week'.
t2_problematic_subclaims: Claim of 'large-scale salvage operation at reservoir and downstream river area this week' based on unverified rumors.
text_analysis.t3_evidence: Post caption states '2026.03 延安' (March 2026 Yan'an) on the image, implying a current event in the future relative to the 300-day disappearance timeline (which started late 2024/early 2025), whereas evidence [8] places the disappearance 'last year' and the search efforts are ongoing investigations, making the specific future-dated stamp contextually misleading for a current report.
t3_problematic_subclaims: Image caption '2026.03' creates a temporal mismatch with the '300 days missing' narrative which implies a past event starting late 2024.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is largely accurate regarding the disappearance case but distorts the scope of recent rescue efforts by framing rumors as facts and uses a temporally confusing image caption.

images.explanation: The image is a genuine news portrait of the missing subject, Zhao Yonggang, consistent with the post's intent to humanize the subject.

images.explanation: The image is a clean, unedited news photo of the search scene, corroborating the specific details (date, location, police presence) mentioned in the post and evidence.

judge.level3_rationale: 该文章虽然基于真实的失踪事件，但将未经证实的网络传言当作既定事实报道，且配图的时间戳（2026年3月）与失踪300天的背景严重不符，同时图片内容（停车场）与文中描述的‘水库打捞’场景完全错位，导致核心信息严重失真。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post fabricates specific details (rescue at reservoir) and misplaces the image in a future timeline, creating a misleading narrative about the current status of the search.
judge.core_claim: The post reports on the disappearance of a school bus driver in Yan'an for over 300 days, citing police findings and network rumors about recent rescue operations, supported by two images.
key_subclaims: The driver, Zhao Yonggang, has been missing for over 300 days.
Police have not found signs of homicide and will continue searching.
Network rumors claim a large-scale salvage operation was conducted at a reservoir and downstream river area this week.
Image 1 shows the missing person, Zhao Yonggang.
Image 2 shows the 'latest rescue progress' with a police cordon, dated 2026.03 in Yan'an.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The driver, Zhao Yonggang, has been missing for over 300 days.
subclaim_findings.note: Confirmed by family statements in news snippets.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Police have not found signs of homicide and will continue searching.
subclaim_findings.note: Confirmed by police response in news snippets.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Network rumors claim a large-scale salvage operation was conducted at a reservoir and downstream river area this week.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence confirms searches in nearby areas but does not confirm the specific 'large-scale salvage at reservoir' claim or the 'this week' timing.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Image 1 shows the missing person, Zhao Yonggang.
subclaim_findings.note: Visual description matches the subject described in the text.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Image 2 shows the 'latest rescue progress' with a police cordon, dated 2026.03 in Yan'an.
subclaim_findings.note: The image shows a parking lot scene with police, but the date '2026.03' implies a future date relative to the 300-day disappearance timeline (which started late 2024/early 2025), creating a temporal mismatch. Additionally, the scene (parking lot) does not match the described 'reservoir and downstream river area' salvage operation.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post contains a core claim about a real disappearance event, but it misrepresents unverified online rumors as confirmed facts (T2) and places the image into a future temporal context (2026.03) that contradicts the 300-day timeline (T3). The image also depicts a parking lot scene rather than the claimed reservoir salvage, creating a semantic and contextual mismatch (C1, C2). The combination of these distortions and the temporal error prevents a 'True' or 'Mostly True' rating.

image_findings.explanation: The portrait of the man aligns with the description of the missing driver and the news context.
The image depicts a parking lot scene, not a reservoir salvage operation; the date '2026.03' creates a temporal inconsistency with the 300-day disappearance timeline.
